question: Write short answers. (8 marks) Example: Does he live near you? Yes, he does.
text_with_gaps: Does your phone have a radio app? [_2_]
Can you play the piano, Sarah? [_4_]
Have you been to Gibraltar, John? [_5_]
Are you and Aysha in the same class? [_6_]
Is there much snow at the moment? [_7_]
Did Rafa's sister come to the party? [_8_]
solutions: Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.
Yes, it does. / No, it doesn't.
Yes, he is. / No, he isn't.
Yes, I can. / No, I can't.
Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
Yes, we are. / No, we aren't.
Yes, there is. / No, there isn't.
Yes, she did. / No, she didn't.
